---
title: "‘“I am too high church and too narrow”; Charlotte Yonge, Macmillan and the Sunday Library.’"
---

## ‘“I am too high church and too narrow”; Charlotte Yonge, Macmillan and the Sunday Library.’

**Author:** Ellen Jordan
**Date:** 2003
**Imprint:** <i>Charlotte M Yonge Fellowship Journal</i>. 6 (2003): 12-25

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
